examples: I don't think you've ever heard Doris talking about her emotional life before.
Who used to cook the fish pie for Doris?
What did Doris think of the waiters at the Country House?
The principal, Doris Roche-Hicks, had made no secret of her prior opposition to charter schools.
The race was won by Kenya's Grace Momanyi in 32:34.11 with team-mate Doris Changeywo clinching silver.
